commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Classify AliasMultiBitNetsShareValue → §10.11 [skip ci]

Section 10.11 "Net aliasing" is the sole clause covering the alias statement in IEEE 1800-2023. It defines that aliased nets overlay the same bits and share the same value — exactly what this test verifies for an 8-bit wire pair. There are no subclauses beneath 10.11.

Move Claude pre-generation from HTTP handler to job processor to fix 504 timeout

The createGeneration endpoint was calling Claude API synchronously (6 variations + product analysis)
before returning a response, causing 504 Gateway Timeout. Now the HTTP handler returns immediately
after queueing jobs, and each BullMQ job handles its own Claude call.

Add accidental positions category for NegRisk bug-locked holdings

Separate NegRisk positions (caused by scanner bug) from volume strategy
friction. These are locked funds awaiting market settlement, not permanent
losses. Updated friction formula to exclude accidental position costs.

- New "accidental" strategy classification (negRisk=True + non-convergence)
- Dashboard card with lock cost, market value, floating PnL, settlement countdown
- Updated reconciliation: total = convergence + accidental - friction

fix(api): handle FUSE/network mount timeouts in /api/ls directory listing

OrbStack's FUSE mount causes TimeoutError when checking for AGENTS.md /
CLAUDE.md / .git inside its directory. The outer try/except only caught
PermissionError, so the unhandled OSError bubbled up as a 500.

- Wrap per-directory metadata checks in try/except OSError
- Add OSError catch to the outer loop for other FUSE/mount failures
- Fix pre-existing lint: duplicate Path import, unused settings variable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 修复 IPRocket 高频调用和换链接任务统计数据不一致问题

## 问题 1: IPRocket API 高频调用触发风控

### 根本原因
- Playwright 实例创建时会调用 IPRocket API 获取代理 IP
- 多任务并发或重试时，可能在短时间内产生大量 API 调用
- 调用间隔 < 50ms 会在第 6 次后触发"业务异常"错误

### 解决方案
1. **全局频率限制** (fetch-proxy-ip.ts)
   - 添加调用队列机制，确保 IPRocket API 调用间隔 >= 100ms
   - 只对 IPRocket 进行限制，不影响其他 Provider

2. **代理凭证缓存** (playwright-pool.ts)
   - 添加 5 分钟代理凭证缓存
   - 新增 allowCredentialsCache 参数控制是否使用缓存
   - 换链接任务启用缓存，减少 67-80% API 调用
   - 补点击任务不使用缓存，确保每次使用不同 IP

3. **补点击任务修复** (click-farm-executor.ts)
   - 修改 forceRefresh=false → forceRefresh=true
   - 确保每次点击使用不同的代理 IP

## 问题 2: 换链接任务统计数据口径不一致

### 根本原因
- 统计计数器每次执行都更新
- 换链历史只在 URL 变化或失败时记录
- 导致 total_swaps ≠ swap_history.length

### 解决方案
- 修改 url-swap-executor.ts
- 确保即使 URL 未变化，也记录到 swap_history
- 保证统计数据和历史记录口径一致

## 影响范围
- ✅ 解决 IPRocket "业务异常"错误
- ✅ 减少 67-80% 的 IPRocket API 调用
- ✅ 保护补点击任务业务逻辑
- ✅ 修复换链接任务统计数据不一致

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix critical data leak: remove final odds (確定オッズ) from models

Both Central V9.2 and NAR V2 were using post-race final odds (odds_log)
as a training feature, which is unavailable at prediction time.

Central V9.2a (leak-free): AUC 0.8456 → 0.8083 (-0.037)
  Pattern A: remove odds_log, horse_weight, condition_enc + derivatives
  Pattern B (reference): remove only odds_log → AUC 0.8096

NAR V2a (leak-free): AUC 0.8717 → 0.8243 (-0.047)
  Pattern A: remove odds_log, horse_weight, condition_enc, pop_rank
  Condition A trio: 65.2% hit, 366% ROI (N=69)
  Condition B trio: 49.4% hit, 432% ROI (N=83)
  Condition E umaren: 60.0% hit, 350% ROI (N=30)

commit.message:
Dramatically improve synthesis coverage: loop gates, frontier expansion, figurative constants

Key fixes that took scrambled program coverage from 14% to 80% paragraphs:

- Add PERFORM UNTIL loop gate detection: scan AST and generated code for
  while-not patterns, set loop variables to falsy to enter loops
- Add Layer 2.5 (frontier expansion): iteratively flip branches in covered
  paragraphs to reach uncovered callees, cascading through multiple rounds
- Fix figurative constant parsing in _parse_condition_variables (ZEROES,
  SPACES, LOW-VALUES etc.) so conditions like "VAR = ZEROES" are understood
- Fix boolean truthiness handling: bare flag conditions (IF FLAG) now
  correctly set True/False instead of sentinel values
- Make Layer 2 iterative with multiple constraint variations and base TCs
- Increase Layer 5 mutation rounds from 20 to 100 with multi-variable mutations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Fix 'Sign in with Google' doing nothing on ViewerLanding

When the user reached ViewerLanding by clicking 'View a shared session'
on the sign-in screen (no Firebase user at all), signOut() was a no-op

Classify AliasThreeNetsShareValue → §10.11 [skip ci]

The test exercises `alias a = b = c` — a three-way net alias — and verifies that a value driven on `a` propagates to `b` and `c`. IEEE 1800-2023 §10.11 "Net aliasing" is the sole clause governing this construct; it has no subsections, making 10.11 the most specific available citation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix S3 dispatch failure on Lightsail by adding missing AWS_REGION (#1096)

## 概要

Lightsail デモ環境の Core Service で S3 Presigned URL 生成が `dispatch failure`
エラーで失敗する問題を修正。

## Issue

Related to なし（デモ環境の運用バグ）

## 原因

`infra/lightsail/docker-compose.yaml` の core-service に `AWS_REGION`
環境変数が未設定だった。
AWS SDK for Rust がリージョンを IMDS から取得しようとするが、Docker の `internal: true`
ネットワーク上では外部通信がブロックされ、`dispatch failure` が発生。

開発環境（`.env.template`）・CI（`ci.yaml`）・API
テスト（`.env.api-test.template`）には設定済みだったが、Lightsail の docker-compose.yaml
のみ漏れていた。

## 確認項目

- [x] `AWS_REGION: ap-northeast-1` を core-service の environment に追加
- [x] 他環境（dev, CI, api-test）との整合性を確認

## 品質確認

- 設計・ドキュメント: N/A（インフラ設定の1行追加）
- テスト: N/A（docker-compose.yaml の環境変数追加のみ）
- コード品質: 他環境の設定と整合
- `just check` pass + CI pass: pre-push フック通過
